counters.description: irelia has everything to counter you with her insane mobility and damage negation and thus remains the most formidable counterpick against aatrox. against her you need to be extremely careful not to overextend. most irelias prepare their engages with quite clear signs such as getting a few minions low next to you. you can try to predict her q and land your own q but other than that it comes down to whether or not you can dodge her e. after bork she becomes way too powerful to reliably kill, so trust your team enough that they can deal with her.

irelia has unmatched sustain and so is pretty much impossible for you to push out of lane. the best thing you can do is try not to push the wave (unless you can 1 shot it) and hold your e defensively. the good news is even if you fall behind early you should still be able to deal with her in teamfights. just focus on not dying and be willing to give up some cs if necessary.

|reccomend conq+boneplating|easy matchup after level 6. the only issue is before level 6, akali's laning power has been heavily nerfed, she's no more a lane bully and katarina with conq or elec can easily out-damage akali's full kit. just make sure to farm properly and abuse your level 6 spike!
ashe is annoying to play against, as it's difficult to get on her. when you walk up she slows you for ages and running away is near impossible aswell.

ignite + tp or flash + tp. grasp. bone plating. doran's shield. his w denies your w shield. you have two options: go full agressive from level 1 and get advantage against him (ignite setup) or play passive and wait for your jg mercy (flash setup).
corrupting potion start, take teleport aswell. you rather gonna play with electrocute or predator. jungler help would be needed due to his wave clear,and ability kit that counters you.

twitch shines against immobile adcs who make easy pray for his stealth engages, and on top of being immobile, aphelios also struggles with being outranged, which makes him particularly weak against spray and pray engages. his pre-6 laning is his weakest stage and this is where you have to try and snowball if the matchup allows. if you get far enough ahead, you may get too strong for him to bully you later.

viktor 1v1 is extremely powerful and also scales very well. play comet e max and you should be able to trade a bit better, but it's still very difficult. he is weak to your gank setup and also not as effective as you in skirmishes, so try stay healthy enough to receive ganks and only trade defensively.

summary of threats: azir struggles vs. early game champions who either outrange him (artillery mages) or have many ways to get on top of him (assassins and some bruisers). his ideal matchups are against melee and short-range champions with either low mobility, low cc, and/or similarly weak early games (eg. annie, yasuo, vladimir), especially if they rely on hitting you in lane to scale (e.g. veigar, swain). [note: this section is being developed. now that i have completed the base guide, i am working on giving a highly detailed game plan for each matchup. some of them are complete.]
get as many pinks as you can around your carries often place them in lane if you're sieging so she can't come from behind, but gl eve is broken and there is not much you can do...

a really good taliyah especially with crit build can mess you up, you have to make sure not to dash with in her rocks because if you do you will instantly get cced. the game is still playable against her you can still it's just that her kit messes you up make sure to focus against her.
very strong vs blitzcrank (ban)
lulu is very strong currently. first few levels before first buy will be tough, try to force her to shield herself/allies instead of using it as a damage ability in early laning.

shaco has boxes which fear you and that makes it really annoying to play against him. when looking for bush control or engages you will definetely step into one, so an early oracle lens can help a lot.

this champ always has an answer to you. she will human e you, if that misses she will spider e. her range forces you to make a move which sucks. she has better 3 camp gank potential. play for cross mapping and teamfights. you can q her spiderlings to get a faster w2 if need be!

he outranges you (and every other adc) by a lot, so fighting is often not possible. try your best to avoid his q's as they're the main source of his damage. avoid trading unless it's an all in, as there is close to no chance you'll be able to outtrade him (if you can even reach him in the first place), and ensure that you have your e or flash to disengage.

this matchup lvl 1 if darius starts q, you should try to walk into his q and proc your passive with your q and go for short trade, that's generally your only trade pattern along with using w on him when it's bad for him to pull u in, most of the lane it's darius favored cose if he ever gets to auto + slow you he will just instantly ghost on u and pull u back if you try to hookshot so you're basically at the mercy of your jungler if he wants to help you crash waves, all you can rly do is try to win the short trades and never try all inning him without huge hp advantage. after lvl 6 remember to use your ult to dodge his q cose it might make u win an all in depending on if the darius is smart and uses his e to guarantee his q. i advise conqueror with tp+ ignite or flash + ignite if you're really cocky.

fair match-up pre level 9 or something around this. later on he can just all-in (+ ghost). his sustain and hp burn make him a champion that cho'gath doesn't like. use your pokes q-w till he is around 40% hp (classic strategy) and after that just go with a full combo to kill him (maybe from bushes for hiding q). "the biggest threat to a darius player is to get cc. poke him, avoid the outer range of his q or fight him right after he uses his q, after that everything becomes easy."

matchup heavily dependant on how good the quinn is and how much jungle help you get, all you can do in early is farm with q and try to poke her with it when she autos and trade with your e, only way you can ever run her down is if she oversteps while being lower hp than you because most quinns will go ignite into darius, i advise dodging this matchup
master yi q completely negates diana combo, as well as his w reduces dianas burst. hardest diana counter in game dodge on sight unplayable
i perma ban naut.
she beats you in any state of the game just try to avoid her and not fall too much behind, you outvalue her if you play your teamfights better
your biggest enemy is yourself. dying and losing mejai's stacks is game-losing.

synergies.description: ahri is excellent with pretty much any ad ganking jungler such as jarvan, xin zhao or lee sin. she can also function fairly well with high damage junglers like graves or kindred.
works perfect for an aggressive playstyle. draven has a lot of damage to follow up on your engage which will lead to a lot of kills.

3 out of 5 aphelios abilities interact with braum's passive to stack it faster, and onslaught stacks it pretty much instantly, making their synergy together crazy good. even aphelios's ultimate stacks braum's passive. he is likely the best support you could have for facing engage supports, but deals quite poorly with ranged matchups as his engage is quite lacking.
aurora is extremely good with any ad ganking jungler that wants to pressure the map.

summary of synergies: azir synergizes best with strong frontline champions, especially those with strong peel/engage. he also pairs very well with strong ad ganking junglers that can help carry him through his weak early game.

caitlyn is probably the best adc in this current meta and works really well with bard. her traps are set up easily by your stun and ultimate. she has a safe lane for you to roam, which is essential for bard.
he can front line really well with you and also target cc with you
an oppressive combo with a lot of slows. ashe's slows set up for an easy hit of your q and a slow.
guaranteed stuns which help you get your full combo off.
you usually buy spirit visage so you increase the heal she gives as well, she can keep mundo alive insanely hard.
you need to play for yourself to consistently win on this champion.
perfect! if you see support yuumi pick ezreal!
